nodes.name: arrangement_backfill.toml
nodes.summary: Simulation test configuration enabling arrangement backfill mode, setting streaming developer options and system parameters for backfill testing.

nodes.name: backfill.toml
nodes.summary: Simulation test configuration for standard backfill mode, specifying server, streaming developer, and system settings for backfill simulation tests.

nodes.name: background_ddl.toml
nodes.summary: Simulation test configuration enabling background DDL execution mode for testing non-blocking schema change behavior in simulation tests.

nodes.name: disable_arrangement_backfill.toml
nodes.summary: Simulation test configuration that explicitly disables arrangement backfill, used to test snapshot-read backfill path in simulation tests.

nodes.name: risingwave-scale.toml
nodes.summary: Simulation test configuration for scale testing, specifying meta, system, and server parameters to simulate a multi-node scaled deployment.
